title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Verify battery charging icon toggles between bolt icon and percentage value when charger is connected and disconnected on the Device Home Screen.
steps: 1. Pair and connect the headset/earbuds to the device.
2. Observe the Device Home Screen to confirm the battery icon is displayed.
3. Connect the device to a charger.
4. Observe the battery icon on the Device Home Screen.
5. Disconnect the charger from the device.
6. Observe the battery icon on the Device Home Screen.
expected: When the headset/earbuds are paired and connected, the battery icon is displayed. When the device is connected to a charger, the battery icon changes to show a bolt icon instead of the percentage value. When the charger is disconnected, the bolt icon disappears and the percentage value is displayed again.
